sections.paragraph:
Original: לקּוּם

Transliteration: laqûm

Phonetic: lak-koom'

BDB Definition:

Lakum = "fortification"
  1. a town on the northern border of Naphtali

Origin: from an unused root thought to mean to stop up by a barricade

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
